commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Active Pipeline and the desktop Cluster Intake section in a left dashboard column, adds a separate mobile Cluster Intake target, renders telemetry into all cluster targets, and removes a brittle raw HTML order assertion.

Reproducibility: no. live browser reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection shows the current-main layout path: Cluster Intake is a separate grid row while the right rail spans two rows, which can make the right rail influence the vertical position before Cluster Intake.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because source review found no actionable PR defect; this should continue through normal maintainer review and checks.

target.title: fix: tighten cluster intake dashboard layout
target.body:
## Summary
- Keep the Cluster Intake section in the left dashboard column directly below Active Pipeline on wide screens.
- Preserve narrow-screen ordering by rendering a mobile Cluster Intake target after the right rail while hiding the desktop target.
- Render cluster telemetry into all visible cluster targets and remove the brittle raw HTML order assertion.

## Verification
- Local dashboard visual check at 1600px: Cluster Intake starts immediately after Active Pipeline in the left column.
- Local dashboard visual check at 900px: visual order is Active Pipeline, right rail, Cluster Intake.
- `pnpm run build:dashboard && node --test test/dashboard-worker.test.ts`
- `pnpm run check`
